results.rendered_html:
deṣṇa (von 1. dā) n. das Geben, Gabe: śruṣṭī deṣṇamabhi gṛṇīhi rādhaḥ  ṚV. 2,9,4 . yadindra pūrvo aparāya śikṣannayajjyāyānkanīyaso deṣṇam 7,20,7 . suśaktirinmaghavantubhyaṃ māvate deṣṇaṃ yatpārye divi 32,21 . uvocitha hi maghavandeṣṇaṃ maḥo arbhasya vasuno vibhāge 37,3 . 58,4 . 93,4 . 3,30,19 . 4,20,10 . puru hi vāṃ purubhujā deṣṇam 6,63,8 .
— Vgl. kumāra˚, cāru˚, tuvi˚, sudeṣṇā, skambha˚.
